name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: 1127 E Twiggs St in Tampa, FL is home to 5 Star Car Title Loans, your source for fast title loans and payday advances.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans operates at 1127 E Twiggs St in Tampa, FL, providing accessible auto title loans and payday advances to local customers. The store is open Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday, 10 AM to 5 PM; it is closed Sundays. For immediate questions, contact the location at 813-859-7154.

This Tampa storefront specializes in car title loans, where you can borrow against your vehicle's equity with same-day funding available. In addition to title loans, the location offers payday advances for those needing quick cash. Call 813-859-7154 to discuss your options with the team at this Tampa branch, who can explain rates, repayment terms, and approval requirements.

Visiting the E Twiggs St location? Bring a government-issued ID, proof of income, and your vehicle's title to expedite approval. 5 Star Car Title Loans at 1127 E Twiggs St, Tampa, FL has built a reputation for fast turnaround and straightforward lending. Many Tampa residents use this location for emergency cash solutions when they need it most.
pros: Same-day funding available for approved applicants
Loan amounts up to $50,000 provide access to substantial emergency cash
Borrowers keep their vehicles while using them as collateral
No prepayment penalties allow early repayment without additional fees
256-bit SSL and TLS security encryption for online applications
Licensed and regulated lender serving 255K+ customers since 2012
Accepts alternative collateral beyond cars (motorcycles, semi-trucks)
cons: APR rates and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website, typical for title loans to be high-cost
Repossession risk if payments are missed, as vehicle serves as collateral
Loan terms and availability vary significantly by state and local regulations
No specific mention of credit requirements or actual approval rates
Customer reviews (11 total) provide limited independent third-party validation
best_for: Borrowers with urgent cash needs and vehicle equity who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
People with poor credit seeking same-day or next-day funding for emergencies
Vehicle owners needing $1,000-$50,000 who want to retain car use during the loan period
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for borrowers with vehicle equity who need emergency cash quickly and cannot access traditional bank loans, particularly those with imperfect credit. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-cost financial products with undisclosed APR rates, repossession risk if payments default, and terms that vary by state—borrowers must review actual loan agreements carefully and understand the full cost before applying.
services: Vehicle title loans up to $50,000 with same-day funding
Motorcycle title loans and alternative vehicle collateral loans
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments up to 24 months
Same-day loans for rent, bills, and car repairs
Online loan application with 256-bit SSL security
Quick approval decisions reported within minutes
Semi-truck and commercial vehicle title loans
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 1127 E Twiggs St, Tampa, FL. Same-day title loans and cash advances to Tampa residents.
